description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and test that runs on workflow dispatch, push to main, and pull requests to main. The workflow uses a concurrency group with a fallback to the run ID and cancels in-progress jobs. It defines a matrix job ci with multiple configurations across macOS, Ubuntu, and Windows, including release, debug, Xcode SDK, MATLAB, and cross tests. For each configuration, check out the repository, set up dependencies, build, and test with specific flags and conditions.
